author: phase-4-coordinator
content: Delivered: ExpFastF64Op/ExpFastF32Op WithSimd impls added to dispatch.rs. exp_fast in explog.rs now routes through dispatch_exp_fast_f64/f32 instead of calling batch functions directly. pulp compiles the WithSimd body for each ISA tier, so LLVM auto-vectorizes for AVX2+FMA without -C target-cpu=native. All 53 ufunc tests pass, clippy clean.
